## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content partnership timeline and details with Turnstile and Panther.](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX limited to 1 client kickoff/week through EOY; Turnstile partnership delayed to Q1 2024](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Turnstile ready to move forward; Panther considering Phase 1 with MDF funds](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [GrowthX produces 5 content pieces/business day in Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Seema to review SOW, prepare for potential December start if slot opens](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Capacity Constraints

  - [Limited to 1 client kickoff/week through EOY](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Focusing on product improvements, demo capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Aiming for January/February 2024 availability for new partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

### Turnstile Partnership Status

  - [Fully bought in, ready to move forward](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Reviewing SOW, backed by First Round Capital](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Website/blog updates in progress](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

### Panther Partnership Status

  - [CEO not fully bought in](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [MDF funds approved for Phase 1](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Considering reevaluation after Phase 1 completion](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### GrowthX Partnership Structure

  - [Phase 1 (8 weeks): Strategy, roadmap, calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Phase 2: Full content production (5 pieces/business day)](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [IP ownership: GrowthX retains, clients get inputs](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [No content person needed on client side](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [GrowthX acts as content engine](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [Potential use of Profound ($3K/month, 90-day opt-out) in interim](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

### Competitor Considerations

  - [Policy for working with competitors/pseudo-competitors](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Separate teams, no knowledge sharing between accounts](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to push for December start date for Turnstile](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Seema to review and provide feedback on SOW](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Tyler to confirm specific January date if December not possible](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Tyler to ask about Seema working from GrowthX office after CMO breakfast](https://fathom.video/share/aPUK7pGLSWuxsfQvsCvAJxF7VkqWefSL?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
